title: Horuset system
content:

{{Quote|There it is. So isolated that it makes up its own system. Marooned in space, as if the other planets have chosen to hide from it.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], describing Korriban|<ref name="Jedi Quest: The Final Showdown">''[[Jedi Quest: The Final Showdown]]''</ref>}}
The '''Horuset system''', also known as the '''Sith system''', contained the lone [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] and its seven [[Moon/Legends|moons]] as well as two surrounding [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belts]]. It was located in the [[Sith Worlds/Legends|Sith Space]] region of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

{{System-stub}}
